name: 多品组合 / Bundle
description: 多个产品一起展示，适用于套装、组合、系列

defaults.background: clean white or soft gradient backdrop
defaults.lighting: even studio lighting covering all products
defaults.composition: multiple products arranged together, balanced composition

overrides.composition: products in a horizontal row, evenly spaced, same scale, front view
products clustered naturally, hero product in front, others slightly behind, overlapping
products arranged diagonally from front to back, staggered heights, dynamic depth
